body_txt: Often, in fiction, the person who you have the crush on lives right next door. Comes in three types.  This neighborhood love interest can overlap with the Girl Next Door who is average and wholesome femininity personified. He might not be able to resist the urge to take advantage on the situation and spy on her or he might visit her by Enter Stage Window . Obviously, not really that rare in Real Life . It's been said that one of the more unusual side effects of the steam engine was that for the first time people weren't limited to marrying their neighbors. Compare Childhood Friend Romance .
